sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Free cash flow per share of Anbio Biotechnology Class A – FWB:N3B
feed.summary: The article presents information related to the free cash flow per share for Anbio Biotechnology Class A, traded on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under the symbol N3B. It appears to be a financial data snippet from TradingView, indicating the period, value, and change in free cash flow per share. The content is primarily a data placeholder within a financial platform's interface.

feed.title: MYR Group Inc. to Attend KeyBanc Industrials & Basic Materials Conference in May
feed.summary: MYR Group Inc. (NASDAQ: MYRG) announced its participation in the upcoming KeyBanc Industrials & Basic Materials Conference. The conference is scheduled to take place on Tuesday, May 31, 2026, marking a significant event for the electrical infrastructure construction company. Investors and interested parties can find more details about MYR Group on its official website.

feed.title: Northeast Bank Joins Rank Of Stocks With 95-Plus Composite Rating
feed.summary: Northeast Bank (NASDAQ: NBN) has achieved a Composite Rating of 96, placing it among the top growth stocks. This strong rating is driven by impressive growth in earnings and sales, and a leading position in its industry group. The stock is currently consolidating below a 35.03 buy point.

feed.title: Textron to Separate its Automotive Equipment, Specialized Vehicles Business
feed.summary: Textron announced its intention to separate its Industrial segment, which includes Kautex and Textron Specialized Vehicles, from its core aerospace and defense businesses. This strategic move aims to create a pure-play aerospace and defense company, "New Textron," and grant the Industrial segment independence to pursue its own growth strategies. The separation is expected to be completed within 12 to 18 months, unlocking long-term value for all stakeholders.

feed.title: BofA Securities Maintains Aflac Inc(AFL.US) With Buy Rating
feed.summary: BofA Securities has reiterated its Buy rating on Aflac Inc (AFL.US). The firm maintains a positive outlook for the insurance company. This continued endorsement suggests confidence in Aflac's future performance.

feed.title: The Bank of N.T. Butterfield & Son Limited Beat Analyst Estimates: See What The Consensus Is Forecasting For This Year
feed.summary: The Bank of N.T. Butterfield & Son Limited (NYSE: NTB) recently reported strong quarterly results, with revenues exceeding analyst expectations by 4.0% and EPS surpassing estimates by 9.3%. Following these results, analysts have raised their revenue and EPS forecasts for 2026, leading to a 13% increase in the price target to US$57.33 per share, despite acknowledging that the company's growth rate is projected to be slower than the broader industry.

feed.title: Transcript: Cboe Global Markets Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets reported record Q1 2026 net revenue of $729 million and adjusted diluted EPS of $3.70, showing significant year-over-year growth. The company announced strategic realignment actions, including asset sales and workforce reduction, to optimize operations and focus on core businesses and emerging opportunities like prediction markets and tokenization. Cboe also provided updated 2026 guidance, projecting low double-digit to mid-teens organic net revenue growth and a 12-14% reduction in adjusted operating expenses.

feed.title: RBC Cuts Price Target on Builders FirstSource to $107 From $110, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has lowered its price target for Builders FirstSource (BLDR) to $107 from $110, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst a series of other analyst price target cuts for the company, indicating a potential reevaluation of its future performance by financial institutions.

feed.title: Inside Boston Scientific's $15 billion offer for Alameda's largest employer
feed.summary: Boston Scientific has made a $15 billion offer to acquire Penumbra, Alameda's largest employer. The deal comes less than three months after a Boston Scientific executive first approached Penumbra's co-founders about a potential partnership, highlighting a swift negotiation process. This acquisition is poised to significantly impact the Bay Area's biotech and healthcare sectors.

feed.title: NatWest CEO Says Customer Activity Healthy in Face of Iran War
feed.summary: NatWest CEO Paul Thwaite reported healthy customer activity, with strong savings and borrowing contributing to a first-quarter profit of £2 billion. This financial stability comes despite global tensions, such as the conflict involving Iran. The bank's performance suggests resilience in its customer base.

feed.title: Blackstone Extends Reach Into Life Sciences And AI Data Infrastructure
feed.summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) has expanded its investment focus into new sectors by committing up to US$400 million to Teva's autoimmune drug program and arranging a US$2 billion financing package for QTS data centers to support AI capacity. These moves diversify Blackstone's earnings beyond its traditional real estate, private equity, and credit strategies, aligning with long-term trends in healthcare and data usage. While these investments offer new growth drivers, investors should also consider the company's valuation, high debt levels, and dividend coverage.

feed.title: UBS Group Boosts Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) Price Target to $216.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has increased its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) to $216.00, up from $202.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a modest 1.68% upside from the previous closing price. The company recently surpassed Q1 earnings estimates with EPS of $1.14 and revenue of $1.33 billion, though revenue was down 2.9% year-over-year.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) Price Target Raised to $232.00 at Stifel Nicolaus
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus has raised its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) to $232.00, suggesting a potential upside of 9.21% from its current price, following the company's beat on quarterly EPS and revenue estimates. Despite a slight revenue decline year-over-year, the company maintained a strong ROE and net margin. However, insider transactions indicate significant selling activity by key executives over the past three months.

feed.title: Moderna Reports Q1 2026 Results: Full Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Moderna reported Q1 2026 revenue of $400 million, a significant increase year-over-year, largely due to a strategic partnership with the UK government, and reiterated its expectation of up to 10% revenue growth for 2026. Despite a GAAP net loss of $1.3 billion primarily from a litigation settlement, the company maintained a strong balance sheet with $7.5 billion in cash and investments. Key developments include the EU approval of a flu-COVID combo vaccine and the initiation of a Phase 3 trial for Intismiran in non-small cell lung cancer, with a strategic focus on expanding its commercial portfolio and leveraging AI and robotics.

feed.title: Baird Adjusts Labcorp Price Target to $334 From $332
feed.summary: Baird has increased its price target for Labcorp Holdings Inc. (LH) to $334 from the previous $332. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the financial analysis firm on the company's valuation. The report was published on May 1, 2026, at 09:20 am EDT.

feed.title: Apple just posted $111 billion in revenue. Now its CFO and incoming CEO are teaming up
feed.summary: Incoming Apple CEO John Ternus and CFO Kevan Parekh are committed to continuing the financial discipline established by Tim Cook. Apple reported a record March quarter with $111.2 billion in revenue, exceeding analyst estimates, driven by strong iPhone sales and growth in its Services segment. Ternus emphasized a focus on product innovation, echoing outgoing CEO Tim Cook's advice.

feed.title: W.W. Grainger (GWW) investors re-elect board and approve 2026 pay and auditor
feed.summary: W.W. Grainger, Inc. shareholders re-elected all management nominees to the board of directors and approved the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor for the year ending December 31, 2026, during their annual meeting on April 29, 2026. Additionally, a non-binding advisory proposal approving the compensation for the Company’s Named Executive Officers passed with significant shareholder support. A total of 47,329,985 shares were eligible to vote, with 41,240,433 shares represented at the meeting.

feed.title: Is Dollar General’s (DG) New Retail Media Push Quietly Redefining Its Competitive Moat?
feed.summary: Dollar General has partnered with Kevel and The Trade Desk to create a unified retail media solution, integrating onsite inventory with offsite activation for advertisers. This initiative is expected to enhance Dollar General's digital and advertising capabilities, potentially supporting its near-term financial performance and deepening the DG Media Network. While it aligns with the company's long-term digital goals, its impact is secondary to core operational efforts like store remodels and new store openings.

feed.title: Lululemon, Apple, Best Buy CEOs among April’s retail C-suite moves
feed.summary: This article details significant C-suite changes in the retail sector during April, highlighting new CEO appointments at Lululemon, Apple (effective September 1), and Best Buy (effective October 31). Other notable moves include leadership changes at Sol de Janeiro, Conagra, Dolce & Gabbana, and Ganni, as well as shifts at Nordstrom, Bath & Body Works, Nike, and Hershey's. The report emphasizes the ongoing executive reshuffling within major retail and consumer brands.

feed.title: Defiance Launches AMA: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Applied Materials, Inc.
feed.summary: Defiance ETFs has launched the Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AMAT ETF (AMA), a new single-stock leveraged ETF designed for active traders. This ETF aims to provide 200% of the daily percentage change in the share price of Applied Materials, Inc. (Nasdaq: AMAT), offering magnified, short-term bullish exposure to the semiconductor industry leader. The fund is intended for knowledgeable investors who understand the risks associated with daily leveraged investments.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. Announces Participation in Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. announced that executives will participate in two upcoming investor conferences in May 2026. Brad Hicks and Josh Phelan will represent the company at the Bank of America 33rd Annual Industrials, Transportation & Airlines Key Leaders Conference, while Darren Field will speak at the Wolfe Research 19th Annual Global Transportation and Industrials Conference. Live presentations and replays will be available on J.B. Hunt's investor relations website.

feed.title: Medallion Bank PREF SER G declares $0.5625 dividend
feed.summary: Medallion Bank PREF SER G has declared a cash dividend of $0.5625 per share.

feed.title: Coca-Cola vs. PepsiCo: Which Dividend King Is the Safer Pick for 2026?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Coca-Cola (KO) and PepsiCo (PEP) to determine which "Dividend King" is a safer investment for 2026. While Coca-Cola boasts higher operating margins and a consistent, predictable revenue stream, PepsiCo offers a higher total return potential and yield due to its snack portfolio's ongoing recovery and a lower current valuation. The analysis suggests PepsiCo may be undervalued given its earnings recovery, despite Coca-Cola's superior structural margins.

feed.title: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Landstar System Following Strong Q1 Results
feed.summary: Landstar System Inc (NASDAQ: LSTR) reported stronger-than-expected earnings and sales for the first quarter, surpassing analyst consensus estimates. Following these positive results, several analysts revised their price targets for Landstar System upwards, although most maintained a "Hold" or "Neutral" rating. The company's shares increased by 2.4% after the announcement.

feed.title: Pool Corp | SCHEDULE 13G: Others
feed.summary: This article provides the title of a document related to Pool Corp, indicating it is a SCHEDULE 13G filing under the category of "Others". It solely states "Document" as its content.

feed.title: Pool Corporation Stock Fell 5% This Week After Earnings. Here’s What the Pullback Tells Investors
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) stock dropped 5.3% despite reporting strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, beating Wall Street estimates. The decline reflects investor concerns over new pool construction and discretionary spending, leading Bank of America to lower its price target. While the company's valuation model suggests a modest 25.1% upside over 2.7 years, investors are keenly awaiting Pool's Investor Day on May 12, 2026, for strategic insights and long-term financial targets.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp Sells 11,692 Shares of PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp recently reduced its stake in PepsiCo, Inc. by selling 11,692 shares during the fourth quarter, decreasing its holdings by 2.0% to 569,877 shares valued at $81.79 million. Despite this, other institutional investors have increased their positions in the company. PepsiCo reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $170.26.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NASDAQ: MTCH) reports 12.25M-share stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 12,246,536 shares, or a 5.26% stake, in Match Group Inc. (NASDAQ: MTCH) as detailed in a Schedule 13G SEC filing for the reporting period ending March 31, 2026. This passive investment grants Vanguard sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 1,783,999 shares. The filing indicates Vanguard's neutral stance as a large passive institutional investor with significant influence.

feed.title: NextEra to Develop 3 GW of Solar for Salt River Project
feed.summary: NextEra Energy Resources has entered an agreement with Salt River Project (SRP) to develop 3 GW of solar generation for the Arizona utility by the end of 2034. This significant expansion will nearly double SRP's existing solar capacity of 1.5 GW, supporting the utility's goal to increase its clean energy resources. The partnership highlights a major investment in utility-scale solar within the Desert Southwest region.

feed.title: APO CLASS ACTION DEADLINE TONIGHT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Apollo Global Management (APO) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on May 1, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating potential claims against Apollo Global Management (NYSE: APO) and reminds investors that the deadline to seek lead plaintiff in a federal securities class action is May 1, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global executives, including Marc Rowan and Josh Black, communicated with Jeffrey Epstein about the firm's tax affairs, contradicting the company's previous statements that it never did business with him. This alleged entanglement led to a drop in Apollo's stock price following reports from the Financial Times and CNN.

feed.title: Vest Financial LLC Decreases Holdings in EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC significantly reduced its stake in EOG Resources, Inc. by 96.7% in the fourth quarter, selling over 83,000 shares and owning a total of 2,870 shares valued at $301,000. Despite this, other institutional investors have recently increased their holdings in EOG Resources. The article also details the company's price performance, recent dividend announcement, analyst ratings, and insider trading activity.

feed.title: Every Man Jack Launches Limited-Edition Grooming Collection with John Deere, Exclusively at Walmart
feed.summary: Every Man Jack has partnered with John Deere to launch a limited-edition grooming collection exclusively at Walmart. The collection features clean, performance-driven essentials like body wash, antiperspirant, and 2-in-1 shampoo and conditioner, with scent profiles inspired by working outdoors. This collaboration aims to celebrate hard work and provide high-quality grooming products for men who "Work Dirty. Clean Easy."

feed.title: 17 ignition risks caught early: PG&E opens grid watch center
feed.summary: PG&E has opened a Continuous Monitoring Center (CMC) in San Ramon to proactively prevent wildfires and outages by centralizing real-time grid monitoring, machine learning, and field response. In 2025, the CMC intercepted 17 potential ignitions, avoided 12 million minutes of unplanned outages, and saved approximately $6 million in operational costs. This initiative integrates data from 5.5 million smart meters and tens of thousands of sensors to enhance safety and reliability.

feed.title: Ferrari fans get AI guide, live quizzes and deeper race data
feed.summary: IBM has launched new AI-powered features for the Scuderia Ferrari app, built with watsonx, including an AI Companion, Game Center with quizzes and leaderboards, and enhanced race data. Since its relaunch in May 2025, the app has seen significant increases in downloads and active users. These updates aim to deepen fan engagement and showcase IBM's AI capabilities in real-world applications.

feed.title: Delta Air Gives Workers 4% Pay Raise Amid Industry Uncertainty
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines Inc. is implementing a 4% pay increase for its employees this year, marking the fifth consecutive year of raises. This move will cost the airline $500 million and comes as the industry faces challenges from surging fuel costs due to the conflict in the Middle East, impacting airlines' profit margins and growth strategies.

feed.title: Every Man Jack Launches Limited-Edition Grooming Collection with John Deere, Exclusively at Walmart
feed.summary: Every Man Jack has launched a limited-edition grooming collection in collaboration with John Deere, available exclusively at Walmart. This partnership aims to celebrate hard work and provide clean, performance-driven grooming essentials for men who "Work Dirty. Clean Easy." The collection includes body wash, antiperspirant deodorant, and 2-in-1 shampoo and conditioner, featuring two exclusive scent profiles, Iron Horizon and Steelwater Springs, all priced at $8.48.

feed.title: Delta Air Gives Workers 4% Pay Raise Amid Industry Uncertainty
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines Inc. announced a 4% pay raise for its employees this year, marking the fifth consecutive annual increase despite industry challenges like surging fuel costs. The raise is projected to cost the airline $500 million. This follows a similar pay increase in 2025.

feed.title: Vest Financial LLC Makes New $1.66 Million Investment in Fifth Third Bancorp $FITB
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC initiated a new position in Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) during Q4, purchasing 35,518 shares valued at approximately $1.66 million. Fifth Third Bancorp reported Q4 EPS of $0.83, exceeding estimates, and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.40. Institutional investors hold a significant portion of the stock, with several major firms increasing their stakes, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: Packaging Corporation of America $PKG Shares Sold by Vest Financial LLC
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC reduced its stake in Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) by 42.4% in Q4, selling 4,693 shares, yet the industrial products company remains a popular holding among institutional investors, with 89.78% ownership. Major investors like Millennium Management LLC, Bank of New York Mellon Corp, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly increased their holdings in Q3. Analysts have issued varied ratings, with an average target price of $229.86, while the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.25.

feed.title: Vest Financial LLC Trims Holdings in Allegion PLC $ALLE
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC significantly reduced its stake in Allegion PLC by 47.5% in Q4, selling 8,482 shares and retaining 9,368 shares valued at $1.492 million. This reduction comes as Allegion reported quarterly EPS of $1.80, missing estimates, but also announced a $0.55 quarterly dividend and a $500 million share buyback authorization. Despite high institutional ownership, analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating on the stock with an average price target of $164.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Raises Stock Position in Las Vegas Sands Corp. $LVS
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC significantly increased its stake in Las Vegas Sands Corp. by 40.6% in Q4 2025, now holding 67,446 shares valued at $4.39 million. Other institutional investors like SG Americas and Nordea also substantially grew their positions, with insider CEO Patrick Dumont selling a portion of his shares. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations with $0.91 EPS on $3.59 billion revenue and declared a $0.30 quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price of $68.28.

feed.title: Kenvue Inc. $KVUE Shares Purchased by Wealthfront Advisers LLC
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC significantly increased its stake in Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) by 117.8% in Q4, acquiring an additional 165,868 shares, bringing their total holdings to 306,713 shares valued at approximately $5.29 million. Kenvue has a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $19.33, and recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2075 per share, resulting in a 4.7% yield. The company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analysts' consensus estimates with $0.27 EPS on revenues of $3.78 billion.

feed.title: 3,578 Shares in Hubbell Inc $HUBB Purchased by Vest Financial LLC
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC recently opened a new position in Hubbell Inc (NYSE:HUBB), acquiring 3,578 shares valued at approximately $1.59 million. This comes as Hubbell exceeded its Q1 earnings estimates and raised its full-year 2026 guidance, projecting strong sales growth and adjusted EPS. Despite positive company performance, insiders have been net sellers, divesting a significant number of shares over the past three months.

feed.title: Stifel Nicolaus Keeps Their Buy Rating on IDEX (IEX)
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus analyst Nathan Jones reiterated a Buy rating on IDEX (IEX) with a price target of $250.00. This follows similar optimism from Citi, while BMO Capital maintained a Hold rating. IDEX reported strong first-quarter earnings, with revenue of $886.9 million and a net profit of $120 million, prompting Baird and Citi to also raise their price targets.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Artemis II Crew to Take Part in 'Bell Moment' at NYSE
feed.summary: The Artemis II crew is scheduled to participate in a "Bell Moment" at the NYSE, an event highlighted by Quantisnow, a real-time market data and news platform. Quantisnow aggregates various financial data for retail investors, tracking companies like The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK), Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (ICE), and KKR & Co. Inc. (KKR), which are also mentioned with their recent analyst ratings.

feed.title: Vest Financial LLC Sells 6,778 Shares of Leidos Holdings, Inc. $LDOS
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC reduced its stake in Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) by 64.7% in the fourth quarter, selling 6,778 shares and leaving it with 3,706 shares valued at $669,000. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Leidos. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating consensus estimates, and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $202.82.

feed.title: Travelers Launches AI-Powered Claims Intelligence Tool in e-CARMA®
feed.summary: Travelers has launched Claim Insights, a new AI-powered tool within its e-CARMA® risk management platform. This innovation helps risk managers more quickly identify, understand, and act on critical claims by optimizing analysis, prioritizing actions, and streamlining management. The tool aims to enhance efficiency and control over claims outcomes for businesses.

feed.title: Salesforce is changing how investors will track its 2027 revenue
feed.summary: Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) has announced updates to its disaggregated revenue reporting structure for fiscal year 2027. The company will now report revenue in two primary categories: Agentforce Apps and Data 360, Platform & Other, reflecting the evolution of its product architecture towards the "Agentic Enterprise." To ensure comparability, Salesforce is providing recast disaggregated revenue data for fiscal years 2025 and 2026.

feed.title: The Gross Law Firm Reminds Shareholders of a Lead Plaintiff
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm is reminding shareholders of Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) who purchased shares between July 23, 2025, and February 3, 2026, about a lead plaintiff deadline of May 4, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Boston Scientific made materially false and misleading statements regarding the growth rate of its U.S. EP segment, leading to a significant stock price decline in February 2026 when disappointing results and guidance were announced. Shareholders are encouraged to register their information to potentially participate in the class action lawsuit.

feed.title: NKTR UPCOMING DEADLINE : The Gross Law Firm Alerts Nektar Therapeutics Stockholders of Securities Class Action - Contact the Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a notice to shareholders of Nektar Therapeutics (NASDAQ: NKTR) regarding a securities class action lawsuit. The complaint alleges that the company made false and misleading statements concerning the integrity and prospects of its REZOLVE-AA trial. Shareholders who purchased NKTR shares between February 26, 2025, and December 15, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm, with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 5, 2026.
